prestazioni: Mercedes-AMG M158 6.0L V12 Bi-Turbo (engine code: M158 EVO) upgraded with a bespoke Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger setup (1.45 A/R turbine housing, 88mm billet compressor wheel) paired with a custom Pagani-designed titanium exhaust manifold featuring Inconel 625 headers and a secondary catalytic converter delete for optimized backpressure reduction, increasing output to 920 HP at 8,500 RPM and 850 Nm of torque at 5,500 RPM with a 9,200 RPM redline

Full Ohlins TTX46 MkII 3-way adjustable coilover suspension with Pagani-specific valving, integrated with a carbon-fiber monocoque chassis reinforcement kit (Pagani Part #HYR-EVO-STR-001) and spherical bearing-mounted upper control arms (Pagani Part #HYR-EVO-SUS-002) for sub-2mm deflection under 3.5G lateral loads

Brembo GT-R 6-piston monobloc calipers (Pagani Part #HYR-EVO-BRK-003) with carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 390mm rear) featuring a proprietary Pagani-developed friction compound (Pagani CarbonSilicon™) for 1,200°C heat resistance and 0.65μ friction coefficient, paired with AP Racing carbon-carbon brake pads (Part #CCP1000) and a Motec C187 dash-logged brake pressure mapping system
estetica: Full Pagani Huayra R Evo Track Pack aero kit (Part #HYR-EVO-AERO-001) featuring a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via MoTeC PDM30), a carbon-fiber rear diffuser with integrated NACA ducts for differential cooling, and a fixed rear wing with a 1.2m chord and 30° attack angle, generating 1,800 kg of downforce at 250 km/h

Custom Pagani x Novitec Torado carbon-fiber body panels (Part #HYR-EVO-BDY-002) with a 2x2 twill weave and a matte clearcoat infused with graphene flakes for UV resistance, including a removable roof panel with a titanium quick-release mechanism (Pagani Part #HYR-EVO-ROOF-001) and side skirts with integrated LED running lights (Luxxen XR1 4800K)

OMP Carbon-Kevlar racing seats (Part #HYR-EVO-INT-001) with Schroth 6-point harnesses (Part #6ASM-2000) and a Pagani-designed titanium roll cage (Part #HYR-EVO-SAFE-001) featuring a 4-point mounting system to the carbon tub, integrated with a fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, Part #LLZ360) and a MoTeC ADL3 dash display with a custom Pagani UI skin
